patch.value:
## Context

SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS (src/cli/commands/schema.ts:42-51) = ['add-type','remove-type','add-status','remove-status','list','show','show-status'].
But the hand-maintained completion lists are:
- bash (src/cli/commands/completion.ts:416): 'list show add-type remove-type add-status remove-status'
- zsh (completion.ts:1033): '(list show add-type remove-type add-status remove-status)'
- fish (completion.ts:1891): 'list show add-type remove-type add-status remove-status'
All three omit 'show-status'.

## Acceptance criteria

- show-status added to bash, zsh, and fish schema subcommand completion lists in src/cli/commands/completion.ts
- All three shells: 'pm schema show-<TAB>' completes to show-status
- No other schema subcommands missing from any shell

## Evidence

- src/cli/commands/schema.ts:42-51 (SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS has show-status)
- src/cli/commands/completion.ts:416 (bash missing show-status)
- src/cli/commands/completion.ts:1033 (zsh missing show-status)
- src/cli/commands/completion.ts:1891 (fish missing show-status)
Shell completion drift: show-status missing from bash/zsh/fish schema subcommand lists

The pm schema show-status subcommand exists in SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS and is fully implemented and documented, but it is absent from all three hand-maintained shell completion lists. Users typing 'pm schema <TAB>' will not see show-status as a suggestion.

- show-status added to bash, zsh, and fish schema subcommand completion lists in src/cli/commands/completion.ts
- All three shells: 'pm schema show-<TAB>' completes to show-status
- No other schema subcommands missing from any shell
pm schema <TAB> offers show-status in all three shells

show-status added at completion.ts bash COMPREPLY, zsh _arguments, fish complete lines; new drift-prevention test asserts every SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS entry appears in all generated scripts (completion-command.spec.ts)
Added show-status to bash/zsh/fish schema subcommand completion lists
